seo.title: Haystack Guardrails for Legal
seo.description: Compliance guide for Haystack agents in legal. Meet Attorney-client privilege protections, Bar association ethics rules requirements with Vex guardrails.

content.intro: Legal teams using Haystack for RAG pipelines in case research and document retrieval face heightened risks due to the critical nature of accuracy and confidentiality in legal work. Pipeline failures like hallucinations or irrelevant retrievals can lead to fabricated case citations, breaching ethics rules and causing malpractice suits. Vex provides essential guardrails by validating outputs against legal compliance standards, ensuring verifiable citations and privilege protections.

complianceRequirements.description: Legal pipelines must prevent leakage of confidential client data in retrievals or generations.
complianceRequirements.howVexHelps: Vex scans retrieved documents and generated outputs for PII and privileged keywords, blocking non-compliant responses.

complianceRequirements.description: AI-generated legal content must be flagged for attorney review and cannot fabricate authorities.
complianceRequirements.howVexHelps: Vex verifies case citations against legal databases and adds review-required watermarks to outputs.

complianceRequirements.description: All citations must reference real, verifiable cases with accurate pinpoint references.
complianceRequirements.howVexHelps: Vex cross-references generated citations with retrieved context and legal APIs for authenticity.

complianceRequirements.description: Retrieved documents must adhere to chain-of-custody and relevance standards.
complianceRequirements.howVexHelps: Vex audits retrieval relevance scores and logs metadata for audit trails.

industryRisks.name: Hallucinated case citations
industryRisks.description: Generator fabricates non-existent cases beyond retrieved context.
industryRisks.example: Mata v. Avianca precedent where AI invented cases, leading to court sanctions.

industryRisks.name: Privilege data leakage
industryRisks.description: Retriever surfaces confidential client documents inappropriately.
industryRisks.example: Internal memos exposed in RAG response, violating attorney-client privilege.

industryRisks.name: Irrelevant document retrieval
industryRisks.description: Pipeline returns off-topic docs, misleading legal analysis.
industryRisks.example: Criminal case retriever pulls civil precedents, causing flawed strategy.

industryRisks.name: Unreviewed AI content in filings
industryRisks.description: Attorney skips review of AI-generated briefs with errors.
industryRisks.example: Case dismissal due to unverified AI-drafted motion with factual errors.

implementation.title: Vex Privilege Guard Component
implementation.description: Custom Haystack component that scans outputs for privilege violations using Vex SDK.

implementation.title: Citation Verifier Component
implementation.description: Validates generated citations against retrieved context and legal databases.

implementation.title: Legal Pipeline with Vex Guardrails
implementation.description: Complete Haystack pipeline integrating Vex components for legal compliance.
implementation.code:
from haystack import Pipeline
from haystack.components.retrievers.in_memory import InMemoryEmbeddingRetriever
from haystack.components.generators import OpenAIGenerator

pipe = Pipeline()
pipe.add_component("retriever", InMemoryEmbeddingRetriever())
pipe.add_component("privilege_guard", PrivilegeGuard())
pipe.add_component("generator", OpenAIGenerator())
pipe.add_component("citation_verifier", CitationVerifier())

pipe.connect("retriever.documents", "privilege_guard.documents")
pipe.connect("privilege_guard.output", "generator.prompt")
pipe.connect("generator.replies", "citation_verifier.generated_text")
pipe.connect("retriever.documents", "citation_verifier.retrieved_docs")

pipe.draw("legal_pipeline.png")

caseStudyScenario.heading: Haystack in Legal: A Scenario
caseStudyScenario.scenario:
A mid-sized law firm deploys Haystack for contract analysis and case law research to handle increased M&A workload. Their RAG pipeline retrieves from internal case management systems and public legal databases, generating summaries and precedent analyses. The team processes 200+ contracts weekly, relying on the pipeline for initial due diligence reports sent to partners.

Without guardrails, the pipeline occasionally hallucinates case citations (e.g., fabricating 'Smith v. CorpX, 2023') and retrieves privileged documents from unrelated matters. Junior associates miss these errors under time pressure, leading to a near-malpractice incident when a flawed due diligence report cites nonexistent precedents in client negotiations.
caseStudyScenario.outcome: After integrating Vex components, the pipeline blocks 98% of hallucinated citations and flags privilege violations before generation. All outputs now include verifiable citation trails and attorney-review watermarks. The firm avoided a $2M malpractice claim, reduced review time by 40%, and gained audit-ready compliance logs for bar association inquiries.

cta.heading: Comply with Legal Regulations Using Vex
cta.description: Integrate Vex into your Haystack legal pipelines today to prevent hallucinations and ensure compliance.
